query:
WITH target AS (
                SELECT id
                FROM api_keys
                WHERE deployment_id = $1
                  AND app_slug = $2
                  AND id > $3
                ORDER BY id
                LIMIT $4
            )
            UPDATE api_keys k
            SET rate_limit_scheme_slug = $5,
                updated_at = NOW()
            FROM target t
            WHERE k.id = t.id
            RETURNING k.id
